descriptors.name: hypothesis_rank.01JSHYP00001CO2RRSPILLOVER
descriptors.definition: Rank 1 of 2 in group HG-CUAU-CO2RR-MECHANISMS. CO spillover hypothesis. Score: +5. Status: supported. Evidence: geometry-dependent selectivity data matches spillover predictions; UMA binding energy trends confirm prerequisite conditions.

descriptors.name: hypothesis_rank.01JSHYP00002CO2RRELECTRONIC
descriptors.definition: Rank 2 of 2 in group HG-CUAU-CO2RR-MECHANISMS. Electronic modification hypothesis. Score: 0. Status: needs_more_data. Evidence: UMA confirms binding energy changes exist, but geometry dependence of experimental data contradicts prediction P-002 (FE should correlate with Au fraction, not spacing).

descriptors.name: observation_score.P001_spillover_geometry
descriptors.definition: 80um Cu / 20um Au gives 25.8% FE(C2H4) vs 15.4% for 160um Cu / 20um Au. Non-monotonic geometry dependence consistent with diffusion-length spillover mechanism (P-002 of H-001).

descriptors.name: observation_score.P002_electronic_geometry
descriptors.definition: Electrodes with same Au surface fraction but different stripe widths show different FE(C2H4). This contradicts the electronic modification prediction P-002 that selectivity should correlate with Au fraction, not spacing.
